input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement analytics agent for SurrealQL query generation

Add schema-aware analytics agent that generates and executes SurrealQL queries for knowledge graph analytics. Includes:
- Analytics user role with VIEWER permissions in SurrealDB schema
- AnalyticsAgent with ToolLoopAgent architecture for query generation and execution
- SurrealQL syntax reference and few-shot examples for prompt guidance
- invoke-analytics-agent dispatch tool for chat agent integration
- Comprehensive eval suite with deterministic seed data and query correctness validation
- TypeScript module declaration for .surql file imports

Closes #81

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Perfect. Now I have a good overview of the changes. Let me create the PR using the gh command.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Implement analytics agent for SurrealQL query generation" --base main --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Adds a schema-aware analytics agent that generates and executes SurrealQL queries for knowledge graph analytics. The agent integrates with the chat system via a dispatch tool and includes comprehensive evaluation infrastructure with deterministic seed data.

- New `AnalyticsAgent` using ToolLoopAgent architecture for query generation and execution
- SurrealQL syntax reference and few-shot examples to guide prompt generation
- Read-only database user role with VIEWER permissions in SurrealDB schema
- Complete eval suite with query correctness validation (target >90% execution rate)
- TypeScript module declarations for .surql file imports

Closes #81

## Test Plan

- Run smoke tests: `bun test tests/smoke/` (verify no regressions)
- Run analytics evals: `bun run eval:analytics` (verify query correctness >90%)
- Manual testing: Start server and ask analytical questions like "How many open tasks?" to verify routing and natural language responses

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Perfect! The PR has been created successfully. Let me provide the user with the URL and confirmation.

content.text:
Perfect! I've successfully created the PR. Here's what I did:

1. ✅ **Committed changes** - All 19 files (both modified and new) were staged and committed with a descriptive message including the GitHub issue reference (#81)
2. ✅ **Pushed to origin** - Branch `marcus-sa/analytics-agent` pushed with upstream tracking
3. ✅ **Created PR** - Opened PR #83 onto `main` branch

**PR Link:** [https://github.com/marcus-sa/brain/pull/83](https://github.com/marcus-sa/brain/pull/83)

The PR includes:
- Analytics agent implementation with SurrealQL query generation
- Read-only database user role for security
- Complete eval suite with seed data and test cases
- All runtime and chat system integration changes

The description includes next steps for testing (smoke tests, analytics evals, and manual verification).
